page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c2g1.large is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 2 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server includes a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM. It does not feature any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is limited to a baseline bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

The CPU configuration lacks support for several advanced instruction sets and hardware features. Specifically, there is no support for AVX, AVX-512, AMX, or cryptography extensions such as AES and SHA_NI. Hyper-threading is also disabled, as indicated by the single thread per core allocation.

Given the inclusion of an entry-level NVIDIA P4 GPU alongside a modest 2-vCPU and 8 GB RAM configuration, this instance represents a low-density GPU resource. It is designed for lightweight GPU-accelerated tasks such as basic video transcoding, small-scale inference, or development workloads rather than heavy parallel computing or large-scale deep learning.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c2g1.large is an x86_64 virtual server running on the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores, 8.0 GB of system memory, and a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached volumes, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. The CPU architecture lacks advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512, AMX, and hardware-accelerated cryptography. This resource profile positions the instance as a budget-friendly, low-density GPU option. It is suitable for entry-level GPU-accelerated workloads, including lightweight media processing, basic model inference, and development environments that require hardware acceleration without high compute or memory overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c2g1.large is a KVM-based server with 2 dedicated vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and one NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM. It lacks local storage and has a 1 Gbps network baseline.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c2g1.large features 2 dedicated vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA P4 GPU. It is designed for entry-level GPU workloads.
tagline: An entry-level, GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring dedicated compute resources and a single hardware accelerator for lightweight parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated vCPUs on x86_64 architecture with 1 thread per core
8.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Targeted at lightweight GPU inference, media transcoding, and development
